name: Butter Chicken
description: Rich tomato-cream gravy with tender chicken. Naan mandatory.

name: Cacio e Pepe
description: Three ingredients. Infinite skill ceiling. Pecorino, pepper, pasta water.

name: Dal Makhani
description: Slow-cooked black lentils with butter and cream. 6-hour simmer. Worth every minute.

name: Pad Thai
description: Tamarind sauce, rice noodles, peanuts, lime. The wok hei makes or breaks it.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Charred paneer cubes marinated in spiced yogurt. Smoky, tangy, addictive.

name: Japanese Ramen
description: Tonkotsu broth from scratch — 12 hours of bone simmering. The egg was perfect.

name: Masala Dosa
description: Crispy fermented rice crepe with spiced potato filling. South Indian perfection.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Molten center, crisp shell. Timing is everything — 12 minutes exactly.
